titleStmt.title: SII 38.389: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 389. (A.R. No. 389 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the east wall, Naṭarāja shrine Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇayadēva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1436, Śrīmukha, Karkaṭka śu. 10, Friday, uttiram = May 13, 1513 A.D. but the month was vrishabha not Karkaṭka. And Śaka year was 1435 and not 1436.

summary.p: It records that 1. Visvēśura Āchchāriyar, the pontiff of Bhikshā-maṭham, who was responsible for the treasury of the temple at Dēvakkāpuram, a dēvasthānam of Rājagambhīranmalai in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu, 2. the tāṉattār 3. Kaḷappāḷar of Sembiyamaṅgalam, 4. Adiyamāṉār 5. and the ūravar, conferred the right of cultivation (uḻavukāṇiāṭchchi) of the hamlet Sembiyamaṅgalam, a village owned by the Tirumalaruḍaiyanāyiṉār temple (tirunāmakkāṇi), on Namaśivāya Nāyakkar, son of Mallappa Nāyakkar, the Kaṉṉaḍiyanāyakkarpāḍigaḷ, who resided at Marudarasarpaḍaivīḍu.

He was to reclaim the land and to induct the cultivators (kuḍiyaḍmēṟṟi) (to cultivate the land). It is also recorded that taxes, kāṇikkai, kaṭṭāyam, poṉvaṟgam, nelvaṟgam, māvaḍai, maravaḍai, vāḻai, karumbu, mañjaḷ, iñji, kamugu, teṉṉamaram, etc., were waived. Instead he was to remit 10 paṇam and 10 kalam of paddy annually commencing from the month of Āḍi to Āṉi from the year, Śrīmukham. Next year he was to pay 20 paṇam and 20 kalam of paddy, next year, (third year) 30 paṇam and 30 kalam of paddy and in the next year, ie., fourth year (Īśura-var-usham) fifty panam and fifty kalam of paddy at the temple treasury. He was also given a house.
The pontiff of Bhikshā-maṭham, Visuvēsuraśivāchāriyār, tāṉattār, Tirumalaināyakka nambi, and others including the temple accountant Īsurabiṟumādirāyar Eṭṭiyār figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī manmakāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭakaṭṭāri cāḷuva kkiṣaṇaiya teva makārāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 6 mel cellā niṉṟa śrīmukavaruṣam kaṟkaṭaka
nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu cukkiṟavāramum tecamiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakoṭṭattu melkuṉṟa nāṭu murukamaṅkalapaṟṟu Irācakempiraṉmalaikku Aṭaitta paṟṟu
tevastāṉam tevakkāpuram nayiṉār tirumalaruṭaiya nayinār śrī paṇṭārattukku kaṭavarāṉa piṣṣāRead pikṣāmaṭam vicuvecuraācāriyarum tāṉattārum Ivaṉaivarum cempiyamaṅkalam kaḷappāḷarum Atiyamāṉārum maṟṟum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūravarum mā
marutaraca paṭaiviṭṭil Irukkum kaṉṉaṭiyanāyakkarpāṭiyile mallappa nāyakkar makaṉār namacivāyanāyakkarku Uḻavukāṇiāṭcci cilātātaṉamRead cilācāṉam paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭi tevastāṉam tirumalaruṭaiya nayiṉār tirunāma
kāṇi Āṉa cempiyamaṅkalam poṉṉāna kuṉṟu karuṅkallukku vaṭakku kollai mel Irācāṇi kollaikku vaṭakiḻakkum Irācāṅkatevar kollai Uḷpaṭa kiḻakkum kaḷappāḷar kollai Uḷpaṭa kiḻakkum mañcar puṟavaṭai vi
ṭṭa teṟkum Irācāḷi puṟavaṭai Uḷpaṭa teṟkum perumāḷ puṟavaṭai Uḷpaṭa meṟkum Atiya perumāḷ puṟavaṭai Uḷpaṭa karuṅkallu vaṭakkum kaḷappāḷar kollaikku meṟkum Uḷpaṭa kollai meṭu
Inta nilamāṉatu Uḷpaṭa Uḻavukāṇiāṭci ka koṇṭu tāṅkalum veṭṭi nilamum tirutti kuṭiyum Eṟṟi � koḷa ceyvaārākavum payirceyyum Iṭattu kāṇikkai kaṭṭāyam
poṉvaṟkam nelvaṟkamum māvaṭai maravaṭai vāḻai karumpu mañcaḷ yiñci kamuku teṉṉamaram nañcai puñcai kaṭamai peṟkaṭamai taṟikaṭamai cekku Oṭṭu mātārikkam talaiārikam
Ācuvakkaṭamai paṭṭaṭai nūlāyam Iṭaittuṟai veṭṭivari kopuravācalil piṟakkum paḻavari putuvari nalerutu naṟpacu nallerumai nal ṭṭu Eḷkaṭṭāyam koḷkaṭṭāyam Eṭuttaḷavu viruttappāṭu Uṭutuṟai mukampārvai
maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalaupātiyum Uḷpaṭa śrīmukavaruṣam Āṭimātam mutal Āṉimātam varaikku varuṣamoṉṟukku tirumalar Uṭaiya nayiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattu celuttum ø10 nellu 1000 Itaṟku Etirām— varuṣam
varuṣam Oṉṟukku ø 2 10 ḷa 2 1000 Itaṟku Etirām varuṣam 1kku ø3 10 ḷa 3 1000 Itaṟku Etirām varuṣam 1kku ø4 10 ḷa 4 1000 Itaṟku Etirām varuṣam Īcura varuṣam mutalāṉa varuṣattukku ø5 10 ḷa 5 1000 Āka Eṉṟeṉ
ṟaikkum caṉtirātittavaraikkum Inta paṇam Aṉpatum nellu Aṉpatiṉ kalamum varuṣam varuṣamtoṟum mukkantāyam Āka koyil paṇṭārattile celuttak kaṭavarākavum Inta Uḻavukāṇiāṭ(c)ci cantirātitta
varaiyum Ivar caṉtāṉa paramparamparamāka Uḷḷataṉaiyum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum Inta nilattukku Ivūr Eri taṇṇir Eṟipāñcamaṭṭum taṇṇir kaṭṭi koḷḷa kaṭavarākavum Inta Uḻavukāṇiāṭcik kuṭi Iruppukku kāṇiāṭcci Āka
paṇṇi kuṭutta maṉai naṟpacu [ø100] vaḷappār caṉṉatitteruvil teṉ ciṟakil kaḷappāḷar tam piṉviṭṭukku kiḻakkum vāykku meṟkum Uḷpaṭṭa maṉaiyum Ivaṟku kāṇiāṭcci Āka caṉtirātittavaraikkum paṇṇi kuṭuttamaikku
pikṣāmaṭam vicuvecuracivaācaāriyar Eḻuttu tāṉattār tirumalai nāyakkanampi caṉtiranampi karaiyeṟa viṭṭār Eḻuttu Āḻvār tirumalainayiṉār Eḻuttu tirumalaiccivaṉ Eḻuttu kaikoḷamutaliyaḷ kaḷappāḷar
kāliṅkarāyar tampirāṉ toḻarvāṇṭār caṉtira nāyaṉār Aṟupattu muvar kollāviṭṭār Eḻuttu kaṇkāṇi Āṇṭār malaipperumāḷ Eḻuttu cempiyamaṅkalam Ūravar kaḷappāḷar Atiyamāṉār Eḻuttu
Ūrkaṇakku Aṉutāriyār Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ coṟpaṭikku Inta kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku yicurapiṟumātirāyar Eṭṭiyār Eḻuttu § namaccivāya .
Digital edition of SII 38.389 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
